object_a.label: ceiling light
object_a.description: Small recessed ceiling light in sloped ceiling
object_a.long_form_open_description: Single recessed can light (round trim) visible in the sloping ceiling above the stair wall. White trim blends with the ceiling; appears flush-mounted and likely provides focused downlighting on the stair area.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Located on the sloped ceiling above the central picture frames and the upper portion of the stairs
object_a.object_text_short: Small recessed ceiling light in sloped ceiling
object_a.object_text_long: center sector | Single recessed can light (round trim) visible in the sloping ceiling above the stair wall. White trim blends with the ceiling; appears flush-mounted and likely provides focused downlighting on the stair area.

object_b.label: picture frame
object_b.description: Square white-framed coastal scene higher on wall
object_b.long_form_open_description: Light-colored (white) frame containing a small, colorful coastal or beach illustration. Mounted on the sloping stair wall above and slightly right of the central framed sailboat print.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Above and slightly right of the central black-framed picture and left of the top-right frame
